sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70000" key="nebrismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεβρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n70000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wearing of a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεβρίς,</foreign> Arignote ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
